assessment.meta_gap: Constraints not questioned (TypeScript-only, CDI rigidity, build-from-scratch)

strategic_findings: Python ecosystem dominates AI agent frameworks (LangGraph, LangChain, AutoGen)

CDI rigidity may reduce agility for AI experimentation
Fortune 500 favors proven tools over bespoke frameworks
